title: Perfect Return Cell
principle: G60 / AT4val[60,6] with 5,3,4 scaffolding is the canonical source form. The visible Perfect Return Cell is a triad-of-diads projection of that form.
boundary: This is a finite Thalean coupling demonstration. It is not a physical gravity model and not a multi-unit G900 field.

cycle.return_condition: The cycle is complete when action returns to W after I->W.

projection_channels.station_nodes: six labeled stations on a closed register
projection_channels.ledger: cycle count, active edge, edge kind, return status
projection_channels.sequence_rail: The full W-X-Y-Z-T-I-W return path with active edge and edge kind.

triad_of_diads.interpretation: The unit is organized as three paired cells. Coupler edges carry the return field between pairs until action returns through IW to W.

source_object.name: G60 Thalean source form
source_object.rule: G60 is the thing. Visible lab forms are projections.

projection.name: triad-of-diads return witness
projection.boundary: The six-station return cell is a witness/projection, not the canonical object itself.

g60_source_binding.rule: Perfect Return Cell must report its G60 source binding.

g900_signature_binding.rule: G900 has a local admission signature, not an external census identity.

hidden_panels.rule: Hidden panels remain in source as diagnostics, but are not shown in the primary public flow.

cocycle_companion_binding.role: companion memory layer for G60 projection work
cocycle_companion_binding.boundary: Validated active aligned cocycle payload; strict origin writer gap remains open.
cocycle_companion_binding.rule: Q sees overlap. The cocycle sees return memory. They are companion layers, not substitutes.

mode_2_sheet_flip_return.label: Projection Mode 2: sheet-flip return
mode_2_sheet_flip_return.source_rule: Projection of G60 / AT4val[60,6] with 5,3,4 scaffolding.
mode_2_sheet_flip_return.boundary: This is a projection witness path, not the canonical source object and not the active rendered cell.
mode_2_sheet_flip_return.relationship_to_mode_1: Mode 1 closes by cyclic edge I-W. Mode 2 returns by reversing through the chain I-T-Z-Y-X-W.
